strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience, including real-time low-latency systems (e.g., Sociomantic, GISCollective)
Demonstrated hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, showing early alignment with agentic AI concepts
Proven track record scaling engineering teams and implementing rigorous engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD) in high-stakes environments
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk experience, which is a core requirement for the role
No clear evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in production at scale (beyond tooling/assistance roles)
Scattered career history with multiple short tenures and roles outside core fintech/agentic AI domains
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical fundamentals in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and engineering leadership, but lacks critical fintech domain expertise and proven production experience with multi-agent AI systems required for the CTO role. His recent work on AI-agent infrastructure is promising but not yet at the scale or regulatory rigor demanded by fintech infrastructure.
